name: Fruit Fritters with Lemon-Bourbon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 Apples, cored and sliced into eighths
4 Bananas, peeled and sliced into eighths
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, water, butter, and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Heat 2 inches of vegetable oil in a Dutch oven or deep-fat fryer to 375°F (190°C).
5. Dip each slice of fruit into the batter, ensuring they are well-coated.
6. Carefully drop the coated fruit slices into the hot oil and fry until golden brown on both sides.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil using a slotted spoon and drain briefly on paper towels.
8. Serve the fritters hot with Lemon-Bourbon Sauce.
Lemon-Bourbon Sauce Instructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch. Stir in the water until well combined.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
3. Remove from heat; stir in the butter until melted.
4. Add the bourbon, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind, mixing well.
5. Serve warm or chilled alongside the fruit fritters.
